observation.summary: EventIngestor append authority was described in Markdown while Draft and CanonicalEvent construction lived in Go source.

hypothesis.summary: A manifest can prove which fields are draft-supplied and which are assigned by EventIngestor by reading Go AST source.

execution.summary: Compare manifest authority fields with internal/ir/ingest Draft and CanonicalEvent builder source and upload field-level evidence.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects generated doc drift, ingestor-assigned fields exposed in Draft, missing draft fields, and missing CanonicalEvent builder assignments.

retrospective.summary: Event append authority reader docs are generated, while Draft and builder source remain the runtime evidence boundary.

evidence.proves: event authority manifest matches Draft and CanonicalEvent builder source
public CI uploads event authority field evidence
